articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro will offer two different battery capacities, claims new rumor
articles.description: The upcoming iPhone 18 Pro is rumored to continue the battery strategy Apple introduced with the iPhone 17 Pro, offering different battery capacities depending on the region. The difference stems from the fact that Chinese models include a physical SIM card slot, whereas iPhone 17 Pro units sold in the...

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 will weigh less than the Galaxy S26 Ultra
articles.description: Samsung’s upcoming wide Galaxy Fold, which is rumored to be called simply Galaxy Z Fold8 became the subject of a series of new leaks. Across several posts on X, tipster Ice Universe detailed several key specs of the Fold8, including its weight, which is allegedly 201 grams. To put that number into perspective, Huawei’s Pura X Max, which holds similar proportions to the Fold8, tips the scales at 229 grams. Samsung’s flagship Galaxy S26 Ultra weighs 214 grams, despite not boasting a folding screen. We saw a similar, though not so apparent, discrepancy between the Galaxy 25 Ultra (218g)...

articles.title: Claude outage: Anthropic says working on fix, and other details
articles.description: India and the US witnessed a significant disruption in Anthropic's AI chatbot, Claude, on June 2. Hundreds of users faced access issues, with Claude Chat being the most affected. While Anthropic acknowledged a partial outage across multiple products, including Claude.ai and its API, the exact cause and recovery timeline remain unclear. This follows similar incidents in April.

articles.title: After repeatedly telling that some entire job categories will be 'totally, totally gone' due to AI, Sam Altman now says that companies who have adopted AI the most are ones hiring the most as ...
articles.description: OpenAI's Sam Altman now contends that AI adoption correlates with increased hiring, not job losses. He suggests companies blaming layoffs on AI might be underutilizing the technology, calling it a "convenient way" to explain cuts. Altman believes human interaction and expertise remain central, with successful AI integration augmenting, not replacing, workers.

articles.title: This day, that year: The patent filed on June 2 that helped make radio, television, wi-fi, and mobile communication possible
articles.description: Guglielmo Marconi, a 22-year-old Italian, filed a groundbreaking patent in London on June 2, 1896, for a system of telegraphy using Hertzian waves. This invention, which enabled wireless transmission of signals through the air, laid the foundation for all modern wireless communication technologies, from radio to mobile phones and Wi-Fi.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max Price, Launch Date in India: Here are latest updates from leaks
articles.description: Apple's iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max may receive a significant camera upgrade with a variable aperture system, a feature typically found on professional cameras. This advancement, alongside a potential foldable iPhone, could lead to increased production costs and possibly higher prices for premium models. Apple might also alter its launch strategy, introducing premium devices first in September 2026.
